title: BoostFPS
description: BoostFPS is a lightweight modpack that boosts performance and increases FPS for smoother gameplay. No useless mods in it.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d86397a36d8b914e7cf3f2e47fe391b5ebd9377.png)
# 🚀 BoostFPS

A lightweight **performance modpack** designed to make Minecraft run smoother and increase FPS — without changing the core vanilla experience.

---

## ✨ Features

* ⚡ Higher FPS on low-end and mid-range PCs
* 🎮 Smoother overall gameplay
* 🧩 Lightweight and easy to install
* 🎈 Focused on FPS, not on random extra mods

---

## 📦 Perfect For

* Players who want a **lag-free** experience
* Low-end PC users
* Anyone who wants vanilla Minecraft, but faster

---
